name: Pineapple Casserole
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Crushed pineapple, drained (Note: Use 5 tablespoons if you have the original amount)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream together the butter and sugar until well combined.
2. Add the eggs to the mixture and stir until incorporated.
3. Fold in the crushed pineapple and bread, ensuring an even distribution of ingredients.
4. Pour the batter into a buttered bread pan.
5. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 40-60 minutes, or until set.
Mrs. William Buffum
